issues.comment: Swapped `dark-light-choose` arguments. The original light-mode value was `$lightness: 30%`, but the new code passes `$lightness: 70%` as the light-mode (first) argument and `30%` as the dark-mode (second) argument. This makes topic-map button links nearly invisible on light themes. Should be: `dark-light-choose(scale-color($primary, $lightness: 30%), scale-color($secondary, $lightness: 70%))`.

Light-mode `h3` color changed from original `$lightness: 20%` to `$lightness: 50%`, making headings significantly lighter/washed out on mobile. The desktop version correctly preserves the original `20%` for light mode. Should be: `dark-light-choose(scale-color($primary, $lightness: 20%), scale-color($secondary, $lightness: 80%))` to match the desktop version and preserve the original light-mode value.
